template_01.title: MCP for Devs
template_01.subtitle: Visual guide to Model Context Protocol
template_01.postIt: Why MCP matters for your stack

step_1.title: The Problem
step_1.body: LLMs are smart but isolated. They can't reach your code, docs, or APIs without custom integrations.

step_2.title: Custom Integrations Don't Scale
step_2.body: Building one-off connectors for every tool creates maintenance hell. Each API change breaks your pipeline.

step_3.title: MCP = Universal Adapter
step_3.body: Like USB-C for AI. One protocol connects any LLM to any tool. Standardize once, connect everywhere.

step_5.title: Minimal Server
step_5.body: 30 lines = working MCP server exposing your filesystem.
step_5.caption: stdio transport, zero deps beyond SDK

step_7.title: Common Traps
step_7.tip: Start with stdio transport. Upgrade to HTTP/SSE only when you need remote access.

step_8.title: Your 5-Minute Start
step_8.closingNote: MCP turns your toolbox into an LLM playground. 🎮
items: Pick one tool you use daily
Write an MCP server for it (30 min)
Connect to Cursor / Claude / VS Code
